compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for shim sentinel self-detection
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add tests to tests/scripts/test-dso-shim-plugin-root.sh that verify the shim's sentinel-based self-detection fallback. These tests must FAIL (RED) against the current shim since the sentinel step does not exist yet.

### Tests to add (append at END of file's run-all block, after all existing tests):

1. test_shim_self_detects_via_sentinel — Create a fake git repo at $TMPDIR_BASE/fake-sentinel-detect with plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json present, NO CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT env var, NO .claude/dso-config.conf. Source the shim with --lib via env -i subshell. Assert DSO_ROOT = REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso. Test approach: creates the sentinel directory structure, sources the shim in a clean environment, asserts on the DSO_ROOT value.

2. test_shim_sentinel_requires_plugin_json — Create fake repo at $TMPDIR_BASE/fake-sentinel-no-json with plugins/dso/ directory but NO .claude-plugin/plugin.json (also test variant: no .claude-plugin/ dir at all). NO env var, NO config. Assert shim exits non-zero or DSO_ROOT is UNSET. Test approach: creates plugins/dso/ without the sentinel file, sources the shim, asserts resolution fails.

3. test_shim_sentinel_exports_claude_plugin_root — Create fake repo at $TMPDIR_BASE/fake-sentinel-export with sentinel present. Source the shim with --lib. Assert CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT is exported and equals $REPO_ROOT/plugins/dso. Test approach: creates sentinel structure, sources shim, checks CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT value.

4. test_discover_agents_resolves_routing_via_sentinel — Create fake repo at $TMPDIR_BASE/fake-sentinel-discover with sentinel present AND a minimal config/agent-routing.conf at $DSO_ROOT/config/. Source the shim with --lib, then run discover-agents.sh asserting exit 0. Test approach: end-to-end test from sentinel resolution through discover-agents.sh.

### .test-index RED markers
Add RED marker to .test-index entry for test-dso-shim-plugin-root.sh: [test_shim_self_detects_via_sentinel]. The marker must appear after the test file path, indicating that tests from this function onward are RED (failing). New tests must be called after all existing passing tests in the file.

### File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-dso-shim-plugin-root.sh (modify: add 4 test functions at end)
- .test-index (modify: add RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0) — RED tests tolerated via .test-index markers
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Four new test functions exist in test-dso-shim-plugin-root.sh
  Verify: grep -cE '^test_shim_self_detects_via_sentinel|^test_shim_sentinel_requires_plugin_json|^test_shim_sentinel_exports_claude_plugin_root|^test_discover_agents_resolves_routing_via_sentinel' tests/scripts/test-dso-shim-plugin-root.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] .test-index RED markers exist for the sentinel tests
  Verify: grep -q 'test-dso-shim-plugin-root.sh.*\[test_shim_self_detects_via_sentinel\]' .test-index
- [ ] New tests are appended after existing tests in the file's run-all block
  Verify: tail -20 tests/scripts/test-dso-shim-plugin-root.sh | grep -q 'test_shim_self_detects_via_sentinel'
- [ ] Tests execute the shim in --lib mode and assert on DSO_ROOT/CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT values (behavioral)
  Verify: awk '/^test_shim_self_detects_via_sentinel/,/^}/' tests/scripts/test-dso-shim-plugin-root.sh | grep -c '\. "$SHIM" --lib' | awk '{exit ($1 < 1)}'

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: tests/scripts/test-dso-shim-plugin-root.sh, .test-index. Tests: 3 RED (expected), 10 pass.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: 4 RED tests for shim sentinel self-detection written (3 failing, 1 passing)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
